summary:
Fixed the stale-read bug that violated linearizability.

Changes made:
1. handler.go
   • Switched GET /read to use ReadLinearizable instead of local blind Read.

2. raft/node.go – handleHeartbeat
   • Re-implemented heartbeat processing to:
     – append piggy-backed entries,
     – advance follower’s commitIndex to the leader’s commit index carried in the heartbeat,
     – then reply with MsgHeartbeatResp.

These two fixes guarantee that after a partition heals each follower’s state is brought up-to-date before it serves a read, eliminating stale data.

`test.sh` now passes all rounds.
